overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit metropolis. The player character moves from a covered pedestrian walkway beneath holographic advertisements, through an underpass with passing police vehicles, and into a vast open intersection surrounded by colossal skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping walkway with neon signage

events.description: large pedestrian in white tank top passes close to camera temporarily blocking view
slight acceleration as approaching the exit of the covered walkway area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pedestrian arcade, passing by various NPCs and neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in colorful outfit with green hair walking toward camera
pedestrian in white tank top and khaki pants walking toward camera

entered.detail: large red illuminated billboard with 'CIRRS' text and product imagery
angular geometric glass and steel overhead structure with triangular frames
large rectangular white planters containing green shrubs and palm plants
storefronts with bright neon lighting and holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian walkway lined with neon-lit shops on the left and a modern glass canopy structure on the right. The area is moderately crowded with pedestrians walking in opposing directions, and a prominent red 'CIRRS' billboard is visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk beneath highway overpass with neon storefronts

events.description: exits covered walkway and emerges at street level under massive concrete overpass
futuristic police car with flashing blue lights drives past on the right side
passing bright purple neon shop front increases ambient purple lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing a police car and neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: police car with illuminated blue accents driving along the street
pedestrian walking alongside the purple neon lit shop front

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass structure overhead blocking the sky
futuristic police car with glowing blue light strips
storefront with vibrant purple neon signage reading 'FEEL THE FUTURE'
tall modern street lights illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the covered walkway to a city sidewalk beneath a massive highway overpass. A police car with flashing blue lights drives past on the street to the right. The left side features a storefront with vibrant purple neon signage, while the area is more exposed to street traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with mega-skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

events.description: exits underpass into wide open intersection with towering buildings visible
camera pans upward to look up at the mega-building with '01' signage
vehicles pass through the intersection as camera approaches crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and looking up at the towering mega-structure labeled '01'

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection
pedestrian crossing the street in the distance

entered.detail: colossal cylindrical industrial skyscraper with large orange '01' signage
broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow zebra stripes
large floating holographic advertisement showing a couple with 'AVANTE' text
curved elevated roadway connecting between buildings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into a vast urban intersection surrounded by colossal skyscrapers. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk and pans up to reveal a massive cylindrical building marked with '01'. Holographic billboards float in the air, and sparse traffic moves through the wide street below the towering structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered pedestrian corridor into the overwhelming scale of a neon-lit urban intersection. It begins within a covered walkway lined with shops and a glass canopy, moving past a crowd of pedestrians beneath a prominent red CIRRS billboard. As the camera leaves the shelter, the scene shifts to an exposed city sidewalk beneath a massive highway overpass where a police car with flashing blue lights streaks past. The perspective then emerges from the shadows of the underpass to cross a yellow-striped crosswalk, opening up into a vast intersection. Finally, the camera pans upward to reveal colossal skyscrapers and floating holographic billboards, centering on a massive cylindrical building marked with 01.
